voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Gió更强的. Lá stronger. Mùi stronger. — corrupted text mixing Chinese and English, completely shatters the Vietnamese literary voice in the chapter's climactic moment
voice_adherence.fix: Replace with Vietnamese: 'Gió mạnh hơn. Lá xào xạc hơn. Mùi rõ hơn.' — or better, use the voice's vocabulary wells: 'Gió đổi chiều. Lá rung. Mùi dạ lan — ngọt hơn — quyện hơn — gần hơn.'
voice_adherence.note: The voice mostly succeeds: body-before-emotion is consistent ('Lạnh từ cổ xuống ngực xuống bụng'), sentence rhythm varies well, water/wear metaphors appear naturally. The corrupted text at the climax is a catastrophic voice break. Also: 'Bà Tâm đã hỏi twice' inserts English without justification.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Tuấn rút lui — his withdrawal is stated through dialogue but the scene ends with him leaving abruptly. We don't feel the weight of his decision because it's compressed into his exit after the argument.
beat_coverage.fix: Give Tuấn one small physical beat before he leaves — perhaps he starts to reach toward Linh's chair, then pulls back, or he touches the empty sixth chair as he passes. His body should show what his words won't.
beat_coverage.note: All five outline beats are present and dramatized. Bách vs Linh debate, Tuấn's withdrawal, Duy's acceptance, Lịch's data discovery, and Ủy Ban visit all get full scenes. The Ủy Ban scene is the strongest — observational, tense, showing bà Tâm's quiet protection through action.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Lịch's analytical speech about Ủy Ban: 'Vì nếu họ nói, tụi mình sẽ tìm. Tụi mình tìm, người đó gọi thêm mưa...' — this reads like a position paper, not someone talking at midnight over cold coffee. Lịch is analytical, but she should stumble here because this is speculation, not data.
character_voice.fix: Break the speech with physical hesitation. Have Lịch start, stop, flip pages she doesn't need to flip. Let her catch herself guessing and recoil from it: 'Mình không nên đoán. Mình nên ghi.' Then the insight about Ủy Ban comes out more reluctantly, as something she doesn't want to be true.
character_voice.note: Bách's voice is the strongest — the eruption of 'mày' is earned and startling. Duy's casual deflection while white-knuckling a glass is excellent character work. The moment Linh asks Lịch 'Cậu ăn chưa?' after a heavy conversation is a perfect voice beat — indirection as intimacy.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: Lịch's discovery about rain frequency is narratively necessary but feels slightly mechanical — she opens sổ, reads dates, delivers conclusion. The plant (rain increases when investigated) is visible as plot delivery.
plants_seeded.fix: Let Lịch discover this differently — maybe she's been quietly tracking this for days, and only now admits it. Or she shows the data reluctantly, knowing what it means. Give her an emotional reaction to her own finding before she shares it.
plants_seeded.note: Ủy Ban thread is seeded naturally through observed action. Tuấn's distancing is shown through a single perfect detail: 'xa hơn hôm qua. Cách một gang tay thay vì vai chạm vai.' Bách's solo Hương Thủy plan sets up future conflict well. The dạ lan smell returning at chapter's end is effective foreshadowing.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Gió更强的. Lá stronger. Mùi stronger. — corrupted, multilingual text in the chapter's closing pages
prose_quality.fix: Replace entirely with Vietnamese that uses the voice's vocabulary wells. Suggestion: 'Gió mạnh thêm. Lá rụng. Mùi — dạ lan — trầm — ai đó đang gọi, gần hơn, gần hơn, gần hơn.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Rửa lấy năm. Rửa lấy tên. Rửa lấy mặt. Nhưng cảm giác — cảm giác để lại. Giống dao rọc giấy. Cắt xong rồi mà vết còn.
prose_quality.note: When the prose works, it's excellent: 'Cái cách bà Tâm rót nước là cách người giúi ai đó sau lưng' is a perfect observational sentence. But the corrupted text is a critical failure. Also: 'twice' appears as English, 'phỏng đoàn' seems like a misspelling of 'phỏng đoán', and several paragraphs in the debate section have uniform structure (topic → dialogue → emotional beat).

continuity.note: Strong continuity from Ch 12. Linh's determination to find the sixth person carries forward. Mưa from Ch 12's end → tạnh by Ch 13 morning. Bách's recent Rửa is acknowledged through 'tay chưa quen.' Linh's insomnia from Ch 11 persists. The chair and water glass motif continues naturally. Emotionally, the group fracture was seeded in Ch 12 and blooms here.

violations: CRITICAL: Bách should be in male body after 4th Rửa (Nam→Nữ→Nam→Nữ→Nam per Ch 10 canon), but chapter consistently uses female markers: 'Mắt cô — mắt mới, mắt sau Rửa' and 'Bàn tay nữ — tay mới, tay chưa quen.' Either the Ch 10 canon entry is wrong or this chapter got Bách's current gender wrong.
Corrupted text 'Gió更强的. Lá stronger. Mùi stronger' contains Chinese and English — not a canon violation per se but suggests text generation errors
'Mình phỏng đoàn' — appears to be misspelling of 'phỏng đoán' (speculate), unclear if intentional
canon_compliance.note: The Bách gender issue is the most significant problem. If Bách Rửa'd from female to male in Ch 10, all the 'cô' and 'bàn tay nữ' references here are wrong. This needs verification against the Ch 10 text and correction.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The debate about whether to investigate vs. accept could happen in any fantasy setting with a curse. The Rửa-specific details (memory loss of loved one, Vòng mechanics, rain-calling costs) are present but don't uniquely shape the argument's structure.
lore_integration.fix: Make the debate more Rửa-specific. When Tuấn says 'sông chảy một chiều,' have him reference a specific Hue belief about the Hương river carrying away what's been Rửa'd. When Duy says accept it, have him reference a specific cultural practice — maybe the 'không yêu sâu' philosophy mentioned in world docs.
lore_integration.note: The Ủy Ban's bureaucratic role is used well — they're not villains, they're administrators. Cô Bích's behavior (arrive after, record after) is a clever detail that serves both plot and worldbuilding. Bà Tâm's protective gestures through service feel authentically Huế.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section — Lịch's data presentation and the subsequent debate — loses momentum. After the visceral Bách/Tuấn confrontation, watching characters discuss statistics feels like a temperature drop.
engagement.fix: Interweave the data with emotional stakes. Maybe Lịch reveals the numbers while visibly shaken, or Linh has a physical reaction to the implications before anyone speaks. Let the data land like a blow, not a lecture.
engagement.note: The chapter's best moments are its surprises: Bách using 'mày' for the first time, Linh asking 'Cậu ăn chưa?' after heavy conversation, bà Tâm's silent protection through deliberately placed glasses. The bún bò scene is genuinely moving. The corrupted text at the end severely damages what should be a haunting closing.

three_weakest_sentences: Gió更强的. Lá stronger. Mùi stronger. — corrupted multilingual text, unforgivable in final draft
Bà Tâm đã hỏi twice có muốn đổi ly nóng không. — unexplained English word 'twice' breaks Vietnamese prose
Mình phỏng đoàn. Mình không nên phỏng đoàn. Mình nên ghi. — 'phỏng đoàn' appears to be misspelling of 'phỏng đoán'; if intentional dialect, it's unclear
three_strongest_sentences: Rửa lấy năm. Rửa lấy tên. Rửa lấy mặt. Nhưng cảm giác — cảm giác để lại. Giống dao rọc giấy. Cắt xong rồi mà vết còn.
Cách bà rót nước là cách người giấu ai đó sau lưng.
Bách tức giận vì Bách là người duy nhất trong nhóm không chấp nhận được. Và khi một người không chấp nhận mà xung quanh đều chấp nhận — người đó trở thành kẻ điên.
ai_patterns_detected: Corrupted multilingual text (Chinese/English mixed into Vietnamese) — likely generation artifact
English word 'twice' appearing unmarked in Vietnamese prose
Some paragraphs in the debate section follow uniform structure: action → dialogue → emotional interpretation
Lịch's data-delivery speech is too clean and well-organized for spontaneous dialogue
Chapter ends with protagonist lying on floor having profound thought — somewhat clichéd moment of solitary contemplation
weakest_dimension: canon_compliance (Bách's gender) and prose_quality (corrupted text) — both are hard failures that require immediate revision
top_3_revisions: FIX BÁCH'S GENDER: If canon says Bách is now male after Ch 10 Rửa, change all 'cô' to 'anh/cậu', remove 'bàn tay nữ', adjust physical descriptions. This is non-negotiable.

REPLACE ALL CORRUPTED TEXT: Remove 'Gió更强的. Lá stronger. Mùi stronger.' and 'twice' — these are generation errors, not artistic choices. Replace with Vietnamese that uses the voice's established vocabulary wells.

RESTRUCTURE LỊCH'S DATA SCENE: Break her analytical speech with physical hesitation and emotional reaction. She's discovering that her friends' investigation is making things worse — that should hurt before she says it.
new_canon_entries: Bách lên kế hoạch đi Hương Thủy một mình vào ngày hôm sau, đóng vai thợ điện đến sửa nước
Lịch xác nhận quy luật: trước khi nhóm bắt đầu điều tra, trung bình ba tuần một trận mưa Rửa; ba tuần kể từ khi bắt đầu nói về điều tra, đã có hai trận
Tuấn công khai từ chối tham gia điều tra, nói 'Mình chấp nhận còn ở bên'
Cô Bích đến quán bà Tâm chiều hôm đó với một người nam mặc sơ mi trắng, ghi chép trong sổ dán nhãn dạ
Bà Tâm cố tình che khuất tầm nhìn của Ủy Ban đối với nhóm bạn — đặt ly so le, quay lưng khi lau bàn
Linh mời Lịch ăn bún bò, nói muốn giữ 'lúc cậu kể' chứ không phải ký ức về Tuấn
Lịch đọc lại dòng ghi ngày mùng một tháng mười: 'Có ai đó đã từng ngồi đây. Mình không nhớ ai. Nhưng ghế này không nên trống' — dòng đã bị gạch bỏ
